Abdulraheem salah
Brand Designer & Front-End Developer
Creating modern brands, websites, and digital experiences through strategy, design, and code.

Brand Designer & Front-End Developer

I'm a Brand Designer and Front-End Developer based in the UAE, with over four years of experience creating visual identities, digital products, and engaging web experiences. My work combines creative thinking with technical execution, allowing me to transform ideas into meaningful and impactful solutions.

01. skills

Proficient in crafting responsive and visually appealing web interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React.js, and Bootstrap. Skilled in transforming design concepts into functional digital experiences with a strong focus on user experience and detail. Experienced in Figma, Adobe Illustrator, and Photoshop, combining creative design principles with modern front-end techniques to deliver polished, high-quality results.

Development

React.js
JavaScript
TypeScript
HTML
CSS

GSAP

02. experience

ALHISAN ALMALAKI L.L.C - UAE, Ajman

Front-end Developer | Graphic Designer
jun 2024 - present

Redesigned homepage layouts and Shopify themes, increasing user engagement by 60%. Assisted in building front-end features within an Agile workflow, participating in sprint planning and daily stand-ups. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver responsive user interfaces and maintain design consistency across multiple projects.

Alfadny Printing Services

Graphic Designer
Apr 2018 - Jun 2021

Led the creative process in packaging design, aligning with industry standards and client expectations, enhancing the company’s reputation in offset and digital printing. Collaborated with clients to review design briefs, prepare, and present innovative drafts and ideas. Produced prototypes and mock-ups, ensuring designs were safe, compliant, and boosted client satisfaction. Developed concepts for a variety of media including signboards and books and enhancing marketing effectiveness

FRONYN TECHNOLOGIES - INDIA, Hyderabad

Web Development Intern
04/2015 - 05/2015

Assisted in building front-end features within an Agile workflow. Participated in sprint planning and stand-ups, gaining experience in iterative development. Worked closely with developers to ensure design-to-code fidelity and UI consistency
